checks.name: diagnostics-coherence
checks.detail: Fresh baseline and independent verifier runs both reproduced the same setup/doctor/verify/repair signals: CODEX_SMOKE_WARNINGS, SERVICES_ALREADY_RUNNING, and MINIAPP_PORT_BUSY, with matching wording and guidance.

checks.name: telegram-invalid-token-classification
checks.detail: The current install-time Telegram result is truthfully classified as invalid_token because the Windows fallback reached Telegram and received HTTP 401, even though direct Node HTTPS timed out earlier.

checks.name: bootstrap-test-hermeticity
checks.detail: The only scoped fix isolates HAPPYTG_STATE_DIR in two installer regression tests so they no longer read the maintainer machine's real ~/.happytg daemon state.

checks.name: verification-commands
checks.detail: pnpm --filter @happytg/bootstrap typecheck, pnpm --filter @happytg/bootstrap test, pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, and pnpm test all passed after the fix.

checks.name: proof-bundle-finalized
checks.detail: spec.md, evidence.md, evidence.json, problems.md, task.json, and verdict.json now reflect the completed proof loop and fresh verifier outcome.
